title: sorbus flabellifolia
intro: Sorbus flabellifolia, also known as the Fanleaf Rowan, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sorbus flabellifolia include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
